title: SLPT Learning Provenance Record
description: Standard Learning Provenance Record for AIQ credential issuance and verification. Contains derived scores and credential metadata. Conforms to SLPT-AIQ-v1.0 §6. See https://github.com/answerrai/SLPT for the specification.

record_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this LPR instance.

platform_id.description: Identifier of the SLPT-compliant platform generating this record.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event completion.

context_id.description: Unique identifier of the specific tutor, assistant, or quiz instance. See §5.3.

institution_id.description: Issuing institution identifier. Null for self-verified learners.

verified_context.description: True if event occurred within an institutionally configured context. See §7.1.

query_text_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the query text. Enables tamper detection without exposing content. See §6.1.

dimension_scores.description: Derived per-dimension scores for this event. These are outputs of the scoring pipeline. See §9.

jq.description: Judgment Quality score for this event.

qo.description: Question Originality score for this event.

dt.description: Discernment and Taste score for this event.

sa.description: Synthesis Under Ambiguity score for this event.

lv.description: Learning Velocity and Adaptability score for this event.

signal_confidence.description: Confidence weight applied to this event in the AIQ weighted average. See §9.1.

computation_method.description: Opaque identifier of the scoring model version used. Enables audit traceability without exposing methodology. See §3 Principle 5.

skills_demonstrated.description: Array of skill taxonomy IDs demonstrated in this event.

outcomes_evidenced.description: Array of learning outcome IDs evidenced in this event.

context_filter_passed.description: True if all mandatory context filter criteria in §7.1 were satisfied.

credential_tier.description: Credential tier under which this event was recorded. AIQ_LEARNER: issued and co-signed by Answer Labs Inc. AIQ_CERTIFIED: co-signed by Answer Labs Inc. and institutional partner.

session_event_index.description: 1-indexed position of this event within its session.

llm_provider.description: Which LLM provider served this interaction.

weighted_composite.description: Weighted composite contribution of this event to the AIQ credential score.

validity_window.description: Validity window classification for this event's contribution.

internal_record_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the corresponding internal LPR. Enables integrity verification without exposing internal content.

issuer_signature.description: Optional platform-level digital signature over this record.
